description_long: This is a small, cylindrical aluminum beverage can with a metallic silver finish and a printed cartoon frog face on its exterior. The can features a standard pull tab on the top, which is slightly raised and circular, typical of most soft drink or beer cans. The frog illustration is bold, with large, expressive eyes and a wide mouth, rendered in green, white, black, and red colors. The can's surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light and giving it a sleek appearance. There are no visible dents, scratches, or signs of rust, indicating the can is in good condition. No brand logos, text, or barcodes are visible on the can.
description: A metallic silver beverage can with a glossy finish, featuring a large cartoon frog face printed on its side. The can is undamaged and has a standard pull tab on top.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full cartoon frog face with wide eyes and mouth, and the pull tab on top.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the edge of the frog's face, with part of the mouth and eye visible, and the rest of the can's plain metallic surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displays the frog face split at the seam, with both eyes and mouth partially visible, and the pull tab on top.
description_view_3: Another side view showing the frog's face partially, with one eye and part of the mouth, and a large area of plain metallic surface.
